{{Quote|For highest kill count, I've got two two credits on Veema. No one can go through males of any species like she can!|Ian Rim|<ref name="Dark" />}}
'''Ian Rim''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] in [[Kyp's Dozen]], a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] affiliated [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|unit]], during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]].<ref name="Dark" />
